assertionResults.fullName: SkillLoader finds matching skills by pattern
assertionResults.title: finds matching skills by pattern

assertionResults.fullName: SkillLoader returns empty for non-matching input
assertionResults.title: returns empty for non-matching input

assertionResults.fullName: SkillLoader returns undefined for unknown skill
assertionResults.title: returns undefined for unknown skill

assertionResults.fullName: HookEngine returns ALLOW when no hooks registered
assertionResults.title: returns ALLOW when no hooks registered

assertionResults.fullName: HookEngine executes hook and returns its result
assertionResults.title: executes hook and returns its result

assertionResults.fullName: HookEngine runs hooks in priority order
assertionResults.title: runs hooks in priority order

assertionResults.fullName: HookEngine handles hook errors with failMode=block
assertionResults.title: handles hook errors with failMode=block

assertionResults.fullName: HookEngine handles hook errors with failMode=warn
assertionResults.title: handles hook errors with failMode=warn

assertionResults.fullName: HookEngine only runs hooks for matching event
assertionResults.title: only runs hooks for matching event

assertionResults.fullName: WorkspaceSandbox getRoot returns the workspace root
assertionResults.title: getRoot returns the workspace root

assertionResults.fullName: WorkspaceSandbox allows files inside the workspace
assertionResults.title: allows files inside the workspace

assertionResults.fullName: WorkspaceSandbox allows the workspace root itself
assertionResults.title: allows the workspace root itself

assertionResults.fullName: WorkspaceSandbox blocks files outside the workspace
assertionResults.title: blocks files outside the workspace

assertionResults.fullName: WorkspaceSandbox validate returns null for valid paths
assertionResults.title: validate returns null for valid paths

assertionResults.fullName: WorkspaceSandbox validate returns error string for invalid paths
assertionResults.title: validate returns error string for invalid paths

assertionResults.fullName: ApprovalMemory ONCE scope is not stored
assertionResults.title: ONCE scope is not stored

assertionResults.fullName: ApprovalMemory THIS_TASK scope applies to same task
assertionResults.title: THIS_TASK scope applies to same task

assertionResults.fullName: ApprovalMemory THIS_SESSION scope applies to any task
assertionResults.title: THIS_SESSION scope applies to any task

assertionResults.fullName: ApprovalMemory different permission classes are independent
assertionResults.title: different permission classes are independent

assertionResults.fullName: VALID_TRANSITIONS CHAT can go to PLAN, ACT, RESEARCH, AUTO
assertionResults.title: CHAT can go to PLAN, ACT, RESEARCH, AUTO

assertionResults.fullName: VALID_TRANSITIONS AUTO can only go to CHAT or PLAN
assertionResults.title: AUTO can only go to CHAT or PLAN

assertionResults.fullName: VALID_TRANSITIONS every mode has at least one valid transition
assertionResults.title: every mode has at least one valid transition

assertionResults.fullName: MODE_CONFIGS every mode has a config
assertionResults.title: every mode has a config

assertionResults.fullName: MODE_CONFIGS CHAT blocks shell and write
assertionResults.title: CHAT blocks shell and write

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager has emoji for current mode
assertionResults.title: has emoji for current mode

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager can switch to a valid mode
assertionResults.title: can switch to a valid mode

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager no-ops when switching to the same mode
assertionResults.title: no-ops when switching to the same mode

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager PLAN→ACT works with approved plan
assertionResults.title: PLAN→ACT works with approved plan

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager *→AUTO denied if user says no
assertionResults.title: *→AUTO denied if user says no

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager *→AUTO accepted if user says yes
assertionResults.title: *→AUTO accepted if user says yes

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager isToolAllowed allows read tools in CHAT
assertionResults.title: allows read tools in CHAT

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager isToolAllowed blocks shell in CHAT
assertionResults.title: blocks shell in CHAT

assertionResults.fullName: ModeManager isToolAllowed allows everything in ACT
assertionResults.title: allows everything in ACT

assertionResults.fullName: MODE_PERMISSION_MATRIX ACT asks for most write actions
assertionResults.title: ACT asks for most write actions

assertionResults.fullName: MODE_PERMISSION_MATRIX AUTO allows write-local but denies deploy/publish/db-write
assertionResults.title: AUTO allows write-local but denies deploy/publish/db-write

assertionResults.fullName: MODE_PERMISSION_MATRIX AUTO always asks for shell-unsafe and git-remote
assertionResults.title: AUTO always asks for shell-unsafe and git-remote

assertionResults.fullName: MODE_PERMISSION_MATRIX every mode covers all 12 permission classes
assertionResults.title: every mode covers all 12 permission classes

assertionResults.fullName: checkPermission returns allow for READ in CHAT
assertionResults.title: returns allow for READ in CHAT

assertionResults.fullName: checkPermission returns deny for shell in CHAT
assertionResults.title: returns deny for shell in CHAT

assertionResults.fullName: checkPermission returns ask for write in ACT
assertionResults.title: returns ask for write in ACT

assertionResults.fullName: getToolPermissionClass defaults to SHELL_SAFE for unknown tools
assertionResults.title: defaults to SHELL_SAFE for unknown tools

assertionResults.fullName: WARN_PATTERNS warns: sudo apt install foo
assertionResults.title: warns: sudo apt install foo

assertionResults.fullName: WARN_PATTERNS warns: git push --force origin main
assertionResults.title: warns: git push --force origin main

assertionResults.fullName: isUnsafeCommand returns true for blocked commands
assertionResults.title: returns true for blocked commands

assertionResults.fullName: isUnsafeCommand returns true for warned commands
assertionResults.title: returns true for warned commands

assertionResults.fullName: isUnsafeCommand returns false for safe commands
assertionResults.title: returns false for safe commands

assertionResults.fullName: PlanStateManager starts with no active plan
assertionResults.title: starts with no active plan

assertionResults.fullName: PlanStateManager creates a plan in draft status
assertionResults.title: creates a plan in draft status

assertionResults.fullName: PlanStateManager cannot approve a non-draft plan
assertionResults.title: cannot approve a non-draft plan

assertionResults.fullName: PlanStateManager cannot start a non-approved plan
assertionResults.title: cannot start a non-approved plan

assertionResults.fullName: PlanStateManager auto-completes plan when all steps done
assertionResults.title: auto-completes plan when all steps done

assertionResults.fullName: PlanStateManager fails a step with error
assertionResults.title: fails a step with error

assertionResults.fullName: ConversationStore adds messages and tracks tokens
assertionResults.title: adds messages and tracks tokens

assertionResults.fullName: ConversationStore getRecent returns last N messages
assertionResults.title: getRecent returns last N messages

assertionResults.fullName: ConversationStore auto-compresses when near token limit
assertionResults.title: auto-compresses when near token limit

assertionResults.fullName: ConversationStore adds tool calls to metadata
assertionResults.title: adds tool calls to metadata

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — CHAT rejects side-effect claims in CHAT mode
assertionResults.title: rejects side-effect claims in CHAT mode

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — CHAT allows normal text in CHAT mode
assertionResults.title: allows normal text in CHAT mode

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — PLAN rejects execution claims in PLAN mode
assertionResults.title: rejects execution claims in PLAN mode

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — PLAN allows planning language in PLAN mode
assertionResults.title: allows planning language in PLAN mode

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — ACT rejects action claims without tool calls
assertionResults.title: rejects action claims without tool calls

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — ACT accepts action claims with tool calls registered
assertionResults.title: accepts action claims with tool calls registered

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard validateForMode — RESEARCH rejects side-effect claims in RESEARCH
assertionResults.title: rejects side-effect claims in RESEARCH

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard clear resets tool call count
assertionResults.title: resets tool call count

assertionResults.fullName: HonestyGuard extractActionClaims returns empty for neutral text
assertionResults.title: returns empty for neutral text

assertionResults.fullName: FileCache evicts oldest when over maxEntries
assertionResults.title: evicts oldest when over maxEntries

assertionResults.fullName: FileCache compress replaces content with placeholder
assertionResults.title: compress replaces content with placeholder
